Name: UTextureRenderTargetCube
Description:
TextureRenderTargetCube
 
  Cube render target texture resource. This can be used as a target
  for rendering as well as rendered as a regular cube texture resource.

Variables.Name: ClearColor
Variables.Description: the color the texture is cleared to

Variables.Name: OverrideFormat
Variables.Description:
The format of the texture data.											
	 Normally the format is derived from bHDR, this allows code to set the format explicitly.

Variables.Name: bHDR
Variables.Description: Whether to support storing HDR values, which requires more memory.

Variables.Name: bForceLinearGamma
Variables.Description: True to force linear gamma space for this render target
